count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":67961},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7165487134349263624","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢，我也算是老粉了吧，总结几点：
1.主角合我胃口，沙雕，善良（划掉）正义，有勇气，也有原则，有时很热血，非常符合我心中的男主形象
2.剧情还不错，行文流畅，几乎所有细节都处理得好，很过瘾
3.文笔还行，每次搞笑恰到好处，让我不自觉地放慢阅读速度，也不会觉得无聊
4.书友素质不错，看评论区也常常很开心，可以看出也有很多人喜欢这本书
5.几乎完美继承上书优点，并且改良（古二蛋那本），很舒服
总而言之很不错，希望以后可以保持，感谢作者的努力了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668345067,"group_id":"7056787327951047687","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"有事@，信息太多了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxsPTtmzxW75VR9FxftIqCY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2edebaca4d28461096e4665772860992~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537095&x-signature=YjFiqzKejiUtM3KAvaZ1%2BTcfAuY%3D","user_id":"97601449590","user_name":"白昼梦蝶舞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"97601449590","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1662389440,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7056787327951047687","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越异界，获得仇恨吸收系统，必须吸收仇恨才能增长战斗力。
